zh.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom於大約1220年出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。她於1238年與Gilbert de Culcheth在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年12月在英國藍卡爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom于大约1220年出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。她于1238年与Gilbert de Culcheth在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年12月在英国藍卡爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom was born about 1220, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England. She married Gilbert de Culcheth in 1238, in Lathom House, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in December 1275, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom est née environ 1220, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Culcheth en 1238, à Lathom House, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1275, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom wurde um 1220 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England geboren. Sie hat 1238 in Lathom House, Lancashire, England Gilbert de Culcheth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1275 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom è nata il circa 1220 nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England. Lei sposato Gilbert de Culcheth nel 1238, nel Lathom House, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1275, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathomは約1220年にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた。1238年にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム ホーウゼでGilbert de Culchethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年12月にイギリスランカシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom(은)는 대략 1220년 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1238년 영국 랭카실르 래톰 허스에서 Gilbert de Culcheth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 12월 영국 랭카실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Culcheth em 1238, em Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1275, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom родилась около 1220 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Culcheth в 1238 г. в местности латом хоус, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла декабрь 1275 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Cecelia de Lathom nació aproximadamente 1220, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Gilbert de Culcheth en 1238, en Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1275, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
